heading: AI-Native Cognitive Sandbox
intro: Designing for the future of Generative Interfaces. Rather than designing static components, I architect structured system specifications that allow AI engines to build and compile custom interfaces in real-time.

prompts.label: Smart-home music widget
prompts.promptText: Generate a compact tactile music card with play state, responsive volume, and glowing ambient backdrop.

prompts.label: Habit log interface
prompts.promptText: Design a responsive weekly checklist tracking routine completions with dynamic percentage status.

prompts.label: Retro calculator layout
prompts.promptText: Build a miniature functional summing counter styled with tactile buttons and a digital matrix readout.

compileSteps: MOUNTING COMPONENT INTO DYNAMIC CANVAS VIEW...

compiler.successMessage: DYNAMIC REACT INTERACTION RENDERED SUCCESSFULLY. READY.
